title: SupervisedReleaseDocket
description: One court docket released into MOCJ's Supervised Release program — a pretrial alternative to bail/detention. Canonical schema for the single MOCJ NYC Open Data dataset 'Supervised Release Dockets' (atne-2dki, 6 columns). One row per released docket; the CourtCase-adjacent grain. This is the only machine-readable trace of a MOCJ program on Open Data (last updated 2023-06-12).

docketId.description: 'docket_id' — numeric identifier representing a single court case.

programEntryDate.description: 'program_entry_date' — date the docket was mandated to Supervised Release by the judge.

supervisionLevel.description: 'supervision_level' — supervision level mandated by the judge at release.

intakeMaxSeverity.description: 'intake_max_severity' — severity of the top charge on the docket.

gender.description: 'gender' — gender of the participant in supervised release.
